Package controller_view

package controller_view
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    GameClock
    GameClock public class that generates a clock object to act as a game clock
    LoginPane
    Public class that is used to generate a login pane in main GUI extends Border Pane
    MainGUI
    Class represents the Main GUI, creates the required stages.
    NormalMode
    NormalMode class that extends Border Pane : represents the single round game mode
    Profile
    Profile : public class that extends Border Pane displays user name and stats
    RoundMode
    RoundMode public class that extends Border Pane represents a round based game mode
    Shop
    Shop public class that extends Border Pane represents the shop which holds new card backs and backgrounds
